title: 24 Pcs Artificial Christmas Poinsettia and Berry Stems Set, Glitter Flowers Berries Pick Sprays for Xmas Tree Decorations Garland Wreath Making Supplies DIY Crafts Home Decor (Champagne)
features: Versatile Set: This set includes 12 pieces of artificial poinsettia and 12 pieces of berry stems, perfect for Christmas tree decorations, garland wreaths, crafts, and holiday home decor.
Premium Quality: Featuring glitter-coated flowers and berries, these stems offer a realistic and festive look to enhance your holiday decorations.
Convenient Size: Each berry stem measures approximately 22 cm in length,and the diameter of Christmas flowers is approximately 14cm, allowing for easy incorporation into various decorative projects.

Easy to Use & Customizable Design: Each stem is designed for easy insertion and positioning, allowing you to create unique and personalized arrangements with ease. Mix and match the glitter flowers with the holly berry picks to create a festive blend that perfectly matches your style and holiday theme.

Elevate Your Holiday Decor with Sparkling Elegance: Introducing our premium 24-piece Artificial Christmas Poinsettia and Berry Stems Set, designed to add a touch of festive glamour to your Christmas tree, wreaths, garlands, or any DIY craft project. Each piece is meticulously crafted to bring a touch of winter wonderland magic to your home decor.
description: Bring the festive spirit to your home with this set of 24 artificial Christmas poinsettia and berry stems. Crafted with glittering details, these lifelike flowers and berries make beautiful additions to your Xmas tree, garlands, wreaths, and holiday decor. With their vibrant colours and realistic textures, these versatile stems allow you to create stunning arrangements for your DIY crafts. Measuring 22 cm in length, these high-quality stems are perfect for adding a touch of seasonal charm to any space. Elevate your holiday decorations with this must-have set.
